title: evolvulus sericeus subsp. holosericeus
intro: Evolvulus sericeus subsp. holosericeus, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is a perennial herb with a history of use in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Evolvulus sericeus subsp. holosericeus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol.
